case_title: PAMELA TROY VS. ONE KINGS LANE, INC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ONE KINGS LANE, INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CRYSTAL BIAGI---SENIOR MANAGER--HUMAN RESOURCES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,384.62 FILED BY TROY, PAMELA AS TO DEFENDANT ONE KINGS LANE, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TROY, PAMELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ONE KINGS LANE, INC $5,384.62 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,504.62 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ONE KINGS LANE, INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2014 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $45.00) SERVED NOV-12-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ONE KINGS LANE, INC
